Claim.description: A single propositional claim extracted from a paper. All claims have an artifact_id, one or more logical_ids, a version_id, type, provenance, and optional conditions and stances. Type-specific fields (concept/value/unit for parameter, expression/sympy for equation, etc.) are all present on this class; the validator enforces which are required per claim type.

artifact_id.description: Durable opaque storage identity for this claim. Format: ps:claim:<opaque-token>.

body.description: Python function body for algorithm claims.

concept.description: Concept ID this parameter claim binds to (e.g., concept12). Required for parameter claims.

concepts.description: List of concept IDs relevant to this observation. Required for observation claims.

conditions.description: CEL expressions defining when this claim holds. Each string is a CEL expression (e.g., "context == 'vowels'"). The conflict detector compares sorted CEL expression lists.

context.description: Required context reference scoping this claim to a first-class logical context.

equations.description: List of equation strings that make up this model. Required for model claims.

expression.description: Human-readable equation string. Required for equation claims.

id.description: Raw local handle rejected by the canonical validation path. Allowed only so the validator can report the identity error explicitly.

listener_population.description: Description of the listener population tested (e.g., native_english, hearing_impaired). Optional for measurement claims.

logical_ids.description: Human-facing namespaced handles for this claim. Old source-local IDs survive only here, never as the storage key. The first entry is the primary display handle.

lower_bound.description: Lower bound of a range estimate. Must appear together with upper_bound.

measure.description: Type of measurement (e.g., jnd_absolute, preference_rating). Required for measurement claims. Any string accepted.

methodology.description: Description of the experimental methodology used. Optional for measurement claims.

name.description: Name of the model (e.g., "Exponential transition model (Model IVb)"). Required for model claims.

notes.description: Free-text methodological context, experimental conditions, or caveats.

parameters.description: Parameter bindings for this model, mapping names to concept IDs. Required for model claims.

provenance.description: Where in the paper this claim was found.

sample_size.description: Number of observations the parameter estimate is based on.

stage.description: Processing stage this algorithm belongs to (e.g., 'excitation', 'filtering', 'radiation').

stances.description: Epistemic relations to other claims. Populated during reconciliation, not during initial extraction.

statement.description: Prose description of the observation. Required for observation claims.

sympy.description: SymPy-parseable equation string. Required for equation claims.

target_concept.description: Concept ID this measurement is about (e.g., concept2). Required for measurement claims.

type.description: The claim type: parameter, equation, observation, or model.

uncertainty.description: Uncertainty measure (e.g., standard deviation). Must appear together with uncertainty_type.

uncertainty_type.description: Type of uncertainty measure. Must appear together with uncertainty.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. Should match the concept's primary unit or a declared alternative. Required for parameter claims.

upper_bound.description: Upper bound of a range estimate. Must appear together with lower_bound.

value.description: Numeric point value. Optional if lower_bound/upper_bound provided. At least one of value or lower_bound+upper_bound must be present for parameter claims.

variables.description: Variable bindings as explicit binding objects. Required for equation and algorithm claims.

version_id.description: Immutable content-derived version identifier for this serialized claim state. Format: sha256:<64 hex chars>.

Claim.title: Claim

ClaimFile.description: Top-level container for claims extracted from a single paper. One YAML file per paper at claims/<paper_dir_name>.yaml.

claims.description: List of propositional claims extracted from the paper.

source.description: Extraction provenance for this claim file.

ClaimFile.title: ClaimFile

ClaimSource.description: Metadata about how claims were extracted from the source paper.

extraction_date.description: ISO 8601 date when extraction was performed.

extraction_model.description: LLM model used for extraction (e.g., claude-opus-4-20250514).

extraction_prompt_hash.description: Hash of the extraction prompt for reproducibility.

ClaimSource.title: ClaimSource

ClaimType.description: The type of propositional claim extracted from a paper.
ClaimType.title: ClaimType

FitStatistics.description: Statistical fit measures for an empirical equation.
FitStatistics.title: FitStatistics

LogicalId.description: A namespaced logical handle for a first-class object.

confidence.description: Classification confidence 0.0-1.0, derived from pass and strength.

namespace.description: Namespace for the logical handle (e.g., Aarts_2015).

pass_number.description: Which NLI pass found this relationship (1 or 2).

value.description: Local handle value inside the namespace (e.g., claim1).

LogicalId.title: LogicalId

MeasureType.description: The type of perceptual or behavioral measurement. These are documented examples; validators accept any string.
MeasureType.title: MeasureType

ParameterBinding.description: Maps a parameter name in a model to a concept in the registry.

concept.description: Concept ID this parameter refers to.

name.description: Parameter name as it appears in the model equations.

note.description: Description of what this parameter represents.

ParameterBinding.title: ParameterBinding

Provenance.description: Where in the source paper a claim was found. Paper and page are required; other fields are optional.

quote_fragment.description: Brief quote from the paper supporting this claim.

Provenance.title: Provenance

Resolution.description: Provenance metadata for how a stance was classified. Optional on Stance.

embedding_distance.description: Cosine distance between source and target claim embeddings.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model used to find candidates.

confidence.description: Classifier confidence for the stance resolution.

model.description: LLM model used for classification (litellm model string).

pass_number.description: Classifier pass number for the stance resolution.

Resolution.title: Resolution

ResolutionMethod.description: How a stance classification was produced.
ResolutionMethod.title: ResolutionMethod

Stance.description: An epistemic relation between two claims. Active voice: the claim holding this stance performs the action on the target. Attack types: rebuts (conclusion), undercuts (inference), undermines (premise). Support types: supports (evidence), explains (mechanism). Preference: supersedes (replaces).

conditions_differ.description: Note about how conditions differ between claims.

note.description: Free-text note about this stance relation.

resolution.description: Provenance for how this stance was classified. Optional.

target.description: Artifact ID of the related claim.

target_justification_id.description: Justification targeted by an undercut stance, when the attack is against an inference rather than the conclusion.

Stance.title: Stance

StanceType.description: The type of epistemic relation between two claims. Active voice: the claim holding this stance performs the action on the target. Attack: rebuts (conclusion), undercuts (inference), undermines (premise). Support: supports (evidence), explains (mechanism). Preference: supersedes (replaces).
StanceType.title: StanceType

UncertaintyType.description: The type of uncertainty measure associated with a parameter claim.
UncertaintyType.title: UncertaintyType

VariableBinding.description: Maps a symbol in an equation to a concept in the registry.

concept.description: Concept ID the symbol refers to.

name.description: Optional variable name used by algorithm claims when a symbolic label differs from the rendered symbol.

role.description: Role of this variable (e.g., dependent, independent).

symbol.description: The variable symbol as it appears in the equation.

VariableBinding.title: VariableBinding

description: Top-level container for claims extracted from a single paper. One YAML file per paper at claims/<paper_dir_name>.yaml.

claims.description: List of propositional claims extracted from the paper.

stage.description: Optional file-level processing stage marker used for render-policy filtering (drafts hidden by default).

source.description: Extraction provenance for this claim file.

title: claim
